title: Evidence-bound operator ML readiness
goal: Establish a trustworthy, proposal-only operator learning dataset and only then evaluate offline machine-learning baselines without reviving Heimlern or granting models routing authority.
completion: Grabowski exposes an evidence-bound shadow capture that reuses canonical route_evidence and distinguishes process lifecycle from independently reviewed semantic outcome.
The Vibe-Lab routing-readiness experiment reaches an explicit reviewed readiness decision from a prospective cohort or closes as rejected/deferred.
Any ML baseline is evaluated offline against a deterministic heuristic baseline and remains advisory with no automatic routing, queue, merge, policy or runtime authority.
